summary: Tested 3 new features: 1) Email notification on chat message, 2) Customer 'Tiendas Seguidas' page, 3) Producer Health Score. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/customer/followed-stores - Returns list of followed stores (requires auth)
GET /api/producer/health-score - Returns health score breakdown (requires producer role)
Customer dashboard shows 'Tiendas Seguidas' nav link with Heart icon
/dashboard/followed-stores page loads with correct title and empty state
Producer dashboard shows Health Score card with score, breakdown, metrics, recommendations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: 1) Email notification on chat message - endpoint POST /api/chat/conversations/{id}/messages sends email to receiver via background task, 2) Customer 'Tiendas Seguidas' page at /dashboard/followed-stores shows followed stores with unfollow option (empty state shown for test user), 3) Producer Health Score at /api/producer/health-score returns score 0-100 based on sales, followers, reviews, products, profile completeness - UI shows card with breakdown and recommendations.

email_notification_on_chat.details: Sends email notification to receiver via background task using Resend API. Email includes sender name, message preview, and link to view message.

customer_followed_stores.nav_link: Tiendas Seguidas with Heart icon in customer dashboard sidebar

score_breakdown.sales: max 25 points based on orders in last 30 days
score_breakdown.followers: max 20 points based on store followers
score_breakdown.reviews: max 25 points based on review count and avg rating
score_breakdown.products: max 15 points based on approved products
score_breakdown.profile: max 15 points based on store profile completeness
